  • [I Won't Go Back](../OnSong_Library_2013-2026 v2.9/I/I Won't Go Back [4].html) — bpm = 62 Key - Bb I Won't Go Back ! ! ! ! ! !! Bb2 F/A ! Gm7 F2 !! Bbsus/Eb ! Fsus F2 V1 V3 ! ! Gm7 F/A ! Bb2 !! Bbsus/Eb !! Fsus F2 !!! ! I've found joy !! peace ! grace !!! and favor ! ! No more chains !! fear !! my past !! is over ! ! ! ! ! ! ! V2 ! !!!! ! ! F/A Bb2 !! I've been changed !! I've been changed ! !!!!!!!!!!!!! ! ! Bbsus/Eb F2 ! !! I have waited for this moment to come ! !!!!!!!!! ( !!! Gm7 Abmaj7 ! F/A ! !! And I won't let it pass me by ! ! ! ! ! ! Bb2 F2 Gm2 Eb2 Bb2 ! Cho. ! F2 Bbsus/Eb ! for Your presence came and changed me ! I've been changed !! healed !! freed !!! delivered ! ! All my shame !!! guilt !!! sins !!! forgiven ! !! Right now is the moment ! today is the day ! Bbsus/Eb F2 Gm7. ! I won't go back ! I can't go back ! to the way it used to be ! ! ! 2nd time ! ! ) ! ! !

  • [I Won't Go Back](../OnSong_Library_2013-2026 v2.9/I/I Won't Go Back [4].html) — bpm = 62 Key - Bb I Won't Go Back ! ! ! ! ! !! Bb2 F/A ! Gm7 F2 !! Bbsus/Eb ! Fsus F2 V1 V3 ! ! Gm7 F/A ! Bb2 !! Bbsus/Eb !! Fsus F2 !!! ! I've found joy !! peace ! grace !!! and favor ! ! No more chains !! fear !! my past !! is over ! ! ! ! ! ! ! V2 ! !!!! ! ! F/A Bb2 !! I've been changed !! I've been changed ! !!!!!!!!!!!!! ! ! Bbsus/Eb F2 ! !! I have waited for this moment to come ! !!!!!!!!! ( !!! Gm7 Abmaj7 ! F/A ! !! And I won't let it pass me by ! ! ! ! ! ! Bb2 F2 Gm2 Eb2 Bb2 ! Cho. ! F2 Bbsus/Eb ! for Your presence came and changed me ! I've been changed !! healed !! freed !!! delivered ! ! All my shame !!! guilt !!! sins !!! forgiven ! !! Right now is the moment ! today is the day ! Bbsus/Eb F2 Gm7. ! I won't go back ! I can't go back ! to the way it used to be ! ! ! 2nd time ! ! ) ! ! !

  • [I Won't Go Back](../OnSong_Library_2013-2026 v2.9/I/I Won't Go Back [4].html) — bpm = 62 Key - Bb I Won't Go Back ! ! ! ! ! !! Bb2 F/A ! Gm7 F2 !! Bbsus/Eb ! Fsus F2 V1 V3 ! ! Gm7 F/A ! Bb2 !! Bbsus/Eb !! Fsus F2 !!! ! I've found joy !! peace ! grace !!! and favor ! ! No more chains !! fear !! my past !! is over ! ! ! ! ! ! ! V2 ! !!!! ! ! F/A Bb2 !! I've been changed !! I've been changed ! !!!!!!!!!!!!! ! ! Bbsus/Eb F2 ! !! I have waited for this moment to come ! !!!!!!!!! ( !!! Gm7 Abmaj7 ! F/A ! !! And I won't let it pass me by ! ! ! ! ! ! Bb2 F2 Gm2 Eb2 Bb2 ! Cho. ! F2 Bbsus/Eb ! for Your presence came and changed me ! I've been changed !! healed !! freed !!! delivered ! ! All my shame !!! guilt !!! sins !!! forgiven ! !! Right now is the moment ! today is the day ! Bbsus/Eb F2 Gm7. ! I won't go back ! I can't go back ! to the way it used to be ! ! ! 2nd time ! ! ) ! ! !

Bbsus/Eb !! Fsus F2 !!! ! I've found joy !! peace ! grace !!! and favor ! ! No more chains !! fear !! my past !! is over ! ! ! ! ! ! ! V2 ! !!!! ! ! F/A Bb2 !! I've been changed !! I've been changed ! !!!!!!!!!!!!! ! ! Bbsus/Eb F2 ! !! I have waited for this moment to come ! !!!!!!!!! ( !!! Gm7 Abmaj7 ! F/A ! !! And I won't let it pass me by ! ! ! ! ! ! Bb2 F2 Gm2 Eb2 Bb2 ! Cho. ! F2 Bbsus/Eb ! for Your presence came and changed me ! I've been changed !! healed !! freed !!! delivered ! ! All my shame !!! guilt !!! sins !!! forgiven ! !! Right now is the moment ! today is the day ! Bbsus/Eb F2 Gm7. ! I won't go back ! I can't go back ! to the way it used to be ! ! ! 2nd time ! ! ) ! ! !

Bbsus/Eb !! Fsus F2 !!! ! I've found joy !! peace ! grace !!! and favor ! ! No more chains !! fear !! my past !! is over ! ! ! ! ! ! ! V2 ! !!!! ! ! F/A Bb2 !! I've been changed !! I've been changed ! !!!!!!!!!!!!! ! ! Bbsus/Eb F2 ! !! I have waited for this moment to come ! !!!!!!!!! ( !!! Gm7 Abmaj7 ! F/A ! !! And I won't let it pass me by ! ! ! ! ! ! Bb2 F2 Gm2 Eb2 Bb2 ! Cho. ! F2 Bbsus/Eb ! for Your presence came and changed me ! I've been changed !! healed !! freed !!! delivered ! ! All my shame !!! guilt !!! sins !!! forgiven ! !! Right now is the moment ! today is the day ! Bbsus/Eb F2 Gm7. ! I won't go back ! I can't go back ! to the way it used to be ! ! ! 2nd time ! ! ) ! ! !

  • [I Won't Go Back](../OnSong_Library_2013-2026 v2.9/I/I Won't Go Back [4].html) — bpm = 62 Key - Bb I Won't Go Back ! ! ! ! ! !! Bb2 F/A ! Gm7 F2 !! Bbsus/Eb ! Fsus F2 V1 V3 ! ! Gm7 F/A ! Bb2 !! Bbsus/Eb !! Fsus F2 !!! ! I've found joy !! peace ! grace !!! and favor ! ! No more chains !! fear !! my past !! is over ! ! ! ! ! ! ! V2 ! !!!! ! ! F/A Bb2 !! I've been changed !! I've been changed ! !!!!!!!!!!!!! ! ! Bbsus/Eb F2 ! !! I have waited for this moment to come ! !!!!!!!!! ( !!! Gm7 Abmaj7 ! F/A ! !! And I won't let it pass me by ! ! ! ! ! ! Bb2 F2 Gm2 Eb2 Bb2 ! Cho. ! F2 Bbsus/Eb ! for Your presence came and changed me ! I've been changed !! healed !! freed !!! delivered ! ! All my shame !!! guilt !!! sins !!! forgiven ! !! Right now is the moment ! today is the day ! Bbsus/Eb F2 Gm7. ! I won't go back ! I can't go back ! to the way it used to be ! ! ! 2nd time ! ! ) ! ! !

Bbsus/Eb !! Fsus F2 !!! ! I've found joy !! peace ! grace !!! and favor ! ! No more chains !! fear !! my past !! is over ! ! ! ! ! ! ! V2 ! !!!! ! ! F/A Bb2 !! I've been changed !! I've been changed ! !!!!!!!!!!!!! ! ! Bbsus/Eb F2 ! !! I have waited for this moment to come ! !!!!!!!!! ( !!! Gm7 Abmaj7 ! F/A ! !! And I won't let it pass me by ! ! ! ! ! ! Bb2 F2 Gm2 Eb2 Bb2 ! Cho. ! F2 Bbsus/Eb ! for Your presence came and changed me ! I've been changed !! healed !! freed !!! delivered ! ! All my shame !!! guilt !!! sins !!! forgiven ! !! Right now is the moment ! today is the day ! Bbsus/Eb F2 Gm7. ! I won't go back ! I can't go back ! to the way it used to be ! ! ! 2nd time ! ! ) ! ! !

Bbsus/Eb !! Fsus F2 !!! ! I've found joy !! peace ! grace !!! and favor ! ! No more chains !! fear !! my past !! is over ! ! ! ! ! ! ! V2 ! !!!! ! ! F/A Bb2 !! I've been changed !! I've been changed ! !!!!!!!!!!!!! ! ! Bbsus/Eb F2 ! !! I have waited for this moment to come ! !!!!!!!!! ( !!! Gm7 Abmaj7 ! F/A ! !! And I won't let it pass me by ! ! ! ! ! ! Bb2 F2 Gm2 Eb2 Bb2 ! Cho. ! F2 Bbsus/Eb ! for Your presence came and changed me ! I've been changed !! healed !! freed !!! delivered ! ! All my shame !!! guilt !!! sins !!! forgiven ! !! Right now is the moment ! today is the day ! Bbsus/Eb F2 Gm7. ! I won't go back ! I can't go back ! to the way it used to be ! ! ! 2nd time ! ! ) ! ! !

Bbsus/Eb !! Fsus F2 !!! ! I've found joy !! peace ! grace !!! and favor ! ! No more chains !! fear !! my past !! is over ! ! ! ! ! ! ! V2 ! !!!! ! ! F/A Bb2 !! I've been changed !! I've been changed ! !!!!!!!!!!!!! ! ! Bbsus/Eb F2 ! !! I have waited for this moment to come ! !!!!!!!!! ( !!! Gm7 Abmaj7 ! F/A ! !! And I won't let it pass me by ! ! ! ! ! ! Bb2 F2 Gm2 Eb2 Bb2 ! Cho. ! F2 Bbsus/Eb ! for Your presence came and changed me ! I've been changed !! healed !! freed !!! delivered ! ! All my shame !!! guilt !!! sins !!! forgiven ! !!   • [I Won't Go Back](../OnSong_Library_2013-2026 v2.9/I/I Won't Go Back [4].html) — bpm = 62 Key - Bb I Won't Go Back ! ! ! ! ! !! Bb2 F/A ! Gm7 F2 !! Bbsus/Eb ! Fsus F2 V1 V3 ! ! Gm7 F/A ! Bb2 !! Bbsus/Eb !! Fsus F2 !!! ! I've found joy !! peace ! grace !!! and favor ! ! No more chains !! fear !! my past !! is over ! ! ! ! ! ! ! V2 ! !!!! ! ! F/A Bb2 !! I've been changed !! I've been changed ! !!!!!!!!!!!!! ! ! Bbsus/Eb F2 ! !! I have waited for this moment to come ! !!!!!!!!! ( !!! Gm7 Abmaj7 ! F/A ! !! And I won't let it pass me by ! ! ! ! ! ! Bb2 F2 Gm2 Eb2 Bb2 ! Cho. ! F2 Bbsus/Eb ! for Your presence came and changed me ! I've been changed !! healed !! freed !!! delivered ! ! All my shame !!! guilt !!! sins !!! forgiven ! !! Right now is the moment ! today is the day ! Bbsus/Eb F2 Gm7. ! I won't go back ! I can't go back ! to the way it used to be ! ! ! 2nd time ! ! ) ! ! !

  • [I Won't Go Back](../OnSong_Library_2013-2026 v2.9/I/I Won't Go Back [4].html) — bpm = 62 Key - Bb I Won't Go Back ! ! ! ! ! !! Bb2 F/A ! Gm7 F2 !! Bbsus/Eb ! Fsus F2 V1 V3 ! ! Gm7 F/A ! Bb2 !! Bbsus/Eb !! Fsus F2 !!! ! I've found joy !! peace ! grace !!! and favor ! ! No more chains !! fear !! my past !! is over ! ! ! ! ! ! ! V2 ! !!!! ! ! F/A Bb2 !! I've been changed !! I've been changed ! !!!!!!!!!!!!! ! ! Bbsus/Eb F2 ! !! I have waited for this moment to come ! !!!!!!!!! ( !!! Gm7 Abmaj7 ! F/A ! !! And I won't let it pass me by ! ! ! ! ! ! Bb2 F2 Gm2 Eb2 Bb2 ! Cho. ! F2 Bbsus/Eb ! for Your presence came and changed me ! I've been changed !! healed !! freed !!! delivered ! ! All my shame !!! guilt !!! sins !!! forgiven ! !! Right now is the moment ! today is the day ! Bbsus/Eb F2 Gm7. ! I won't go back ! I can't go back ! to the way it used to be ! ! ! 2nd time ! ! ) ! ! !
